name: My back injury at work was from normal job duties but I had pre-existing issues - is it covered?
description: Yes if work caused or aggravated it, per Utah law on usual exertions.[4]

mainEntity.name: My back injury at work was from normal job duties but I had pre-existing issues - is it covered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if work caused or aggravated it, per Utah law on usual exertions.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah workers' comp covers injuries from usual exertions if there's a causal link to employment, even with pre-existing conditions.[4] The injury must arise by accident in the course of employment. Key factors: (1) Prove causation between job duties and aggravation; (2) Medical records showing work worsened condition; (3) No need for unusual event; (4) Internal failures require employment nexus. Get a doctor's note tying injury to work and file promptly. An attorney can help prove the connection if denied.[4]
